\boxed{}
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I find no credible link between Williams syndrome and obesity, mental retardation, or precocious puberty. Instead, these associations are documented in syndromes like Prader-Willi, Bardet-Biedl, or hypothalamic dysfunction — none of which describe Williams syndrome. Therefore, Option D contains a medically inaccurate assertion and stands out as the exception among the choices.
